task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Dear Priya,

Welcome to the Project Helios integration environment! We are thrilled to officially begin this integration journey with you and the IT team at Meridian Group. 

As NovaBridge's premier data integration platform, Project Helios is designed to seamlessly streamline data ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and securely deliver pristine data to your reporting platform via robust APIs and webhooks. We know that Meridian Group places a high priority on reliable live-data pipelines and ensuring a smooth, predictable path to UAT. We are confident that Helios will provide your team with the exact visibility, control, and performance required from day one.

To help you get started, we will send your secure access credentials and comprehensive onboarding documentation in a separate communication within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, here is a quick overview of our immediate next steps:

1. IT Infrastructure Diagram: Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram to facilitate our integration environment setup (target date: July 12, 2026, as previously discussed).
2. UAT Environment Access: We look forward to your team provisioning access to the UAT environment by July 19, 2026.
3. Stakeholder Demo Preparation: We will work closely with you to resolve any remaining setup items well ahead of our stakeholder demo on July 25, 2026.

Should you or your team have any technical questions, please feel free to reach out to Derek Okafor, our Technical Lead, at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For any questions regarding project coordination or scheduling, I will be your primary point of contact. 

We look forward to a highly successful collaboration with you and the entire Meridian Group team. Please let us know if there is anything we can do to further support you during this onboarding phase.

Warm regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

No further actions were taken, adhering to your instructions. Let me know if you need any additional adjustments!
